scope: Cycle 10: Bug hunt C9 (clean) + RunHudOverlay CRT HUD feature
overall_assessment: Cycle 10: C9 bug hunt clean (encounter_card_overlay.gd + screen_dither_layer.gd verified). RunHudOverlay feature: 292-line CanvasLayer with CRT-styled life bar, ogham button (long-press switch), period indicator, card counter, promise badges, biome currency. Wired into Run3DController (47 lines). Fixed anchor propagation bug in _wrap_in_margin. Fixed card_index not syncing to HUD after cards. 25 total bugs fixed across 10 cycles.
